---
pagetitle: "Site en construction"
navbar: false
grid:
  sidebar-width: 0px
  body-width: 1200px
  margin-width: 0px
---

```{r}
glue_qmd <- \(x, .envir = parent.frame()) {

  stringr::str_glue(x, .open = "<<", .close = ">>", .envir = .envir)

}

social_icon <- \(id, icon, set = "fa6-brands") {

  glue_qmd("
    <a
      href='{{< var links.<<id>>.href >}}'
      title=<<id>>
      target='_blank'
      rel='noopener'>
      <iconify-icon
        icon='<<set>>:<<icon>>'
        width='1.5em'
        height='1.5em'>
      </iconify-icon>
    </a>
  ")

}
```

::: {.temp-page}

![](/_img/logo-homepage.png){style='max-width:100%;'}

# SITE EN CONSTRUCTION

Notre nouveau site arrive bientôt

Pour une demande d'aide méthodologique, contactez-nous par mail

::: {.index-logo}
```{=html}
<div class="index-logo-alisp-social">
  <div class="index-logo-social">
    `r social_icon(id = "mail", icon = "envelope", set = "fa")`
    `r social_icon(id = "insta", icon = "instagram")`
    `r social_icon(id = "twitter", icon = "x-twitter")`
    `r social_icon(id = "facebook", icon = "facebook")`
    `r social_icon(id = "linkedin", icon = "linkedin")`
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

:::

```{=html}
<style>
.temp-page {
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 3rem;
  h1 {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    border: 0;
  }
  p {
    font-size: 1.7rem;
  }
}
.index-logo-social {
  font-size: 3rem !important;
  gap: 2rem !important;
}
.nav-footer {
  display: none
}
@media(max-width: 36em) {
  html {
    zoom: 55%
  }
}
</style>
```
